name: DeepSeek-R1-0528
_comment_mla: Multi-head Latent Attention (DSv3-style). With mla set, KV cache uses (d_c + d_qk_rope)·b = 576 bytes/tok/layer at FP8 (vs the prior n_kv=5 approximation that gave ~280); per-layer attention parameters use the 6-matrix sum from attention.md §3.3 (~187 M/layer) instead of the GQA approximation (~109 M/layer). The n_kv field is retained at the canonical n_q value but is ignored when mla is set; it falls back to GQA behavior only if mla is removed.
_comment_k_active: 8 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=9.
